document_chunks.chunk_text: Life Plan Goal: Attend two community outings per week with coping supports. Desired outcome: Increase independence and reduce outing anxiety.. Status: At Risk.
Life Plan Goal: Maintain seizure safety protocol and medication schedule. Desired outcome: Reduce missed doses and seizure risk.. Status: Stalled.
Life Plan Goal: Follow diabetic meal plan and complete daily glucose checks. Desired outcome: Improve health stability.. Status: At Risk.
Life Plan Goal: Use walker and attend PT to reduce fall risk. Desired outcome: Decrease falls and improve safe mobility.. Status: Stalled.
Life Plan Goal: Attend scheduled work training and complete assigned tasks. Desired outcome: Build work stamina and reliability.. Status: Stalled.
SPMP support need: Anxiety before outings. Strategy: Use visual schedule 30 minutes before outing.. Trigger: Unplanned outing, crowded environment. Response: Pause, redirect, offer quiet space.
document_chunks.chunk_summary: Support plan for Anxiety before outings

document_chunks.chunk_text: SPMP support need: Seizure precautions. Strategy: Medication administration must be documented every evening.. Trigger: Missed medication documentation. Response: Notify nurse if dose not documented.
SPMP support need: Diabetes management. Strategy: Glucose checks before breakfast and dinner; document refusals.. Trigger: High sugar foods or missed check. Response: Notify nurse for high reading.

SAP support need: Fall prevention. Strategy: Walker within reach; escort during overnight bathroom use.. Trigger: Unsteady gait, fatigue, cluttered hallway. Response: Incident report and PT follow-up.
SAP support need: Low mood/fatigue. Strategy: Reminder calls before work training and behavioral health follow-up.. Trigger: Missed session, low mood. Response: Notify care manager after no-show.
Refused mall outing; visual schedule not documented. Staff reported anxiety and pacing.
Outing cancelled due to transportation van unavailable.
Attended library outing with preferred staff after visual schedule.
Staff shortage; planned grocery outing not offered.
Evening medication documentation missing in MAR; nurse notified.
Medication taken as scheduled.
Medication administered late due to pharmacy delay.
MAR not signed by staff; medication status unclear.
Glucose check completed; breakfast included sweetened cereal despite meal plan.
Refused glucose check; no nurse follow-up documented.
Glucose reading above threshold; nurse notified.
Dinner glucose check missing.
Walked to bathroom without walker; staff heard stumble.
PT appointment missed due to transportation not scheduled.
Fall in bedroom; minor bruise, incident report filed.
Hallway clutter noted near bedroom; cleared by staff.
Missed work training; reported low mood and stayed home.
Attended training but left early due to fatigue.
No call/no show for training; follow-up not documented.
Reported medication made him sleepy; task completion low.
Evening MAR not signed; medication status unclear. Action: Nurse notified; MAR audit recommended.
Fall in bedroom during overnight bathroom use; minor bruise. Action: First aid, incident report, PT follow-up requested.
Community outing not offered due to staff shortage. Action: Program manager notified.

barriers.barrier_description: Anxiety and refusal before community outings when visual schedule/prep is missing.
Community outings cancelled due to unavailable van.
Evening medication documentation missing or late.
Glucose checks missed/refused and meal plan inconsistently followed.
Walker not consistently used; missed PT and clutter increase fall risk.
Low mood/fatigue affects attendance and task completion.

interventions.intervention_description: Use visual schedule and countdown timer before every outing.
Reserve van two days before planned outings and define backup activity.
Complete evening MAR audit for 2 weeks and escalate unsigned entries.
Review glucose refusal protocol and meal plan compliance.
PT to review room setup and walker placement.
Schedule counseling review for low mood and fatigue.

incidents_and_risks.incident_description: Evening MAR not signed; medication status unclear.
Fall in bedroom during overnight bathroom use; minor bruise.
incidents_and_risks.immediate_action_taken: First aid, incident report, PT follow-up requested.

incidents_and_risks.incident_description: Community outing not offered due to staff shortage.

appointments.outcome_summary: MAR audit recommended for evening shift.
Appointment missed due to transportation not scheduled.
Follow-up appointment recommended but not scheduled.

bottleneck_insights.bottleneck_summary: Community inclusion goal is at risk due to anxiety, transportation cancellation, staff shortage, and inconsistent visual schedule documentation.
bottleneck_insights.supporting_evidence: Daily notes show refusals, cancelled outing, staff shortage, and success when visual schedule was used.
bottleneck_insights.recommended_review_action: Review visual schedule compliance, reserve transportation, and assign consistent staff.

bottleneck_insights.bottleneck_summary: Seizure safety goal is stalled because evening medication documentation is repeatedly missing or late.
bottleneck_insights.supporting_evidence: Daily notes and incident record show MAR not signed and late medication.
bottleneck_insights.recommended_review_action: Start MAR audit and pharmacy delivery escalation process.

bottleneck_insights.bottleneck_summary: Diabetes management goal is at risk due to missed glucose checks and meal plan inconsistency.
bottleneck_insights.supporting_evidence: Notes show sweetened cereal, refused glucose check, high reading, and missing dinner check.
bottleneck_insights.recommended_review_action: Nursing review and staff meal-plan refresher required.

bottleneck_insights.bottleneck_summary: Mobility/safety goal is stalled due to walker non-use, missed PT, fall incident, and clutter.
bottleneck_insights.supporting_evidence: Notes show bathroom use without walker, missed PT due to transportation, bedroom fall, and hallway clutter.
bottleneck_insights.recommended_review_action: Complete home safety review and transportation scheduling control.

bottleneck_insights.bottleneck_summary: Employment goal is stalled due to low mood, fatigue, missed sessions, and overdue behavioral health follow-up.
bottleneck_insights.supporting_evidence: Daily notes show missed training, fatigue, no-call/no-show, and medication-related sleepiness.
bottleneck_insights.recommended_review_action: Schedule behavioral health follow-up and reminder call workflow.
